title: eurotia ceratoides var. tragacanthoides
intro: Eurotia ceratoides var. tragacanthoides, also known as the Russian thistle or silver sagebrush, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically dried and used as a demulcent, or mucilage, to soothe and protect mucous membranes, or made into a tea to aid in digestion.
